evals.prompt: generate an example for the vpc module at infrastructure/vpc
evals.expected_output: An example/main.tf that uses source = "../", sets the required variables (customer, environment, vpc_cidr, common_tags), uses realistic placeholder values, and has inline comments. No provider or terraform blocks.

assertions.text: Output contains source = "../" for the vpc module
Output includes all required variables: customer, environment, vpc_cidr, and common_tags
Output does NOT contain a terraform {} block or provider {} block
Output contains at least one inline # comment explaining a value

evals.prompt: write an example for the eks_cluster module. the example needs to show a working node group configuration
evals.expected_output: An example/main.tf that includes a vpc dependency module using a pinned git source, then the eks module using source = "../" that references the vpc outputs. Includes a realistic node_groups_attributes block.

assertions.text: The eks module block uses source = "../"
A vpc dependency module is included using a git source pinned to a specific version (contains ?ref=)
The eks module references module.vpc outputs for vpc_id and subnets (e.g., module.vpc.vpc_id)
The output contains a node_groups_attributes block with instance_types, min_size, max_size, and desired_size
Output does NOT contain a terraform {} block or provider {} block

evals.prompt: the rds module's variables.tf has been updated — a new required variable called `backup_window` (string, e.g. "02:00-03:00") was added. Update the example at infrastructure/rds/example/main.tf to include it
evals.expected_output: The existing example/main.tf with backup_window added to the module block, keeping all existing variables intact, with an inline comment explaining the format.

assertions.text: Output contains backup_window with a value like "02:00-03:00"
Original variables are preserved: db_identifier, engine, instance_class, username, vpc_id are all still present
The backup_window line has an inline comment explaining the HH:MM-HH:MM format
